code:
sequenceDiagram autonumber working branch->>main: Can I merge changes? loop MERGE CONFLICTS main-->>working branch: Merge conflicts. working branch-->>main: Merge conflicts resolved. end Note right of working branch: Merge conflicts are addressed
before premerge check starts. loop PREMERGE CHECK main->>main: Lint, Test (unit), Build. main-->>working branch: Premerge check failure. working branch-->>main: Premerge failures fixed. end Note right of working branch: Premerge checks
affected sources. main->>main: Premerge success: Lint, Test (unit), Build / Deploy main. Note left of main: On premerge success
all sources are checked. loop RELEASE main->>release: Release functionality Note left of main: Each release release branch
gets overwritten with main. release->>release: Lint, Test (E2E, optional), Build / Deploy staging. release-->>main: Hotfix required. main-->>working branch: Hotfix required. working branch-->>working branch: I have a hotfix. Go to step 1. end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的代码合并到发布的流程图。核心是从working branch发起合并请求，经过premerge检查，最后走到release环节。
好的，我先确认一下结构。working branch向main发起合并请求，然后有个MERGE CONFLICTS的循环处理冲突，对吗？冲突解决后才进入premerge检查？
对，冲突必须在premerge检查之前解决。另外要在working branch右边加个注释，说明冲突解决后才能开始premerge检查。
已经加上注释了。现在画PREMERGE CHECK循环，里面包含lint、unit test和build这三个步骤，如果失败会返回给working branch修复。
premerge成功后，main要执行deploy吗？还有，release分支怎么处理？我们每次发布都要从main同步。
我建议这样：premerge成功后main执行"Lint, Test (unit), Build / Deploy main"。然后进入RELEASE循环，main把功能同步到release分支，每次release分支都会被main覆盖。
可以，但release里的测试要区分一下：E2E测试是optional的，unit test是required。还有hotfix的流程——如果release发现问题，要能从main回到working branch打hotfix。
加上了。release阶段包含E2E optional测试和staging部署。hotfix路径是：release发现需要hotfix → 通知main → 通知working branch → working branch自己处理hotfix，然后回到第1步重新走合并流程。
等等，main左边的注释位置不对，应该说明"On premerge success all sources are checked"，不是放在release那边。还有working branch右边关于affected sources的注释也要补上。
已修正。main左边注释说明premerge成功后所有sources都被检查，working branch右边注释说明premerge checks affected sources。整个流程从合并请求、冲突处理、premerge检查、发布到hotfix回环都完整了。
